name: Scope of Services
text: The Service Provider shall provide the services described in this Agreement with reasonable skill, care, and diligence in accordance with the agreed specifications and timelines.

legal_basis.note: Certainty of terms — services must be defined
Deficiency of service — applicable to consumer transactions

title: Scope of Services
dispute_hotspots: Scope creep — client demands work beyond Schedule 1 without additional payment
Key personnel replacement — client loses trust in delivery
Subcontracting — data security and liability chain issues
SLA disputes — what is 'uptime' and how is it measured
